steps.name: And user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
When user navigates to "Videos" section of Manage
And user "searches" the entity "video with all artifacts" from Manage "Videos" using Filter "Latest First"
And user performs "Copy" on the video/podcast from the listing
Then user verifies kapsule "Copy video by automation" is processed and have all resolutions
Then user verifies highligh and transcript on video "Copy video by automation"
